overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in winter clothing walking through a snowy mountain resort village. The character traverses from an open plaza past wooden lodges, crosses an asphalt road, and continues up a snowy hillside path surrounded by pine trees and residential buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy resort plaza with stone benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open snowy plaza toward the large wooden lodge ahead

entered.detail: multi-story wooden mountain lodge with green trim and snow-covered roof
rectangular stone seating structures dusted with snow
low wooden building with ski lift cables extending upward
snow-capped peaks visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open snowy plaza surrounded by large wooden resort buildings. Stone benches sit in the foreground while a ski lift station is visible to the left. The bright midday sun illuminates the snow-covered ground as the character moves toward the central lodge.

events.description: exiting the open plaza into a narrower path flanked by pine trees

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the snow, passing between buildings with increasing tree coverage

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining the path ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving beyond the plaza, the character enters a more enclosed path lined with pine trees. The large wooden lodge remains visible ahead while the ski lift station shifts to the right side of the frame. The environment transitions from open square to tree-lined walkway.

events.description: character steps from snow-covered ground onto cleared asphalt road
character leaves the asphalt road and begins ascending the snowy hillside path

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt road and transitioning onto an uphill snow path

entered.detail: cleared black asphalt road cutting through the snow
multi-story wooden apartment buildings with balconies
small utility shed with shingled roof

segments.scene_description: The character reaches an asphalt road and crosses it, transitioning from the resort plaza area into a residential zone. Wooden apartment buildings appear on the right while a small utility shed becomes visible ahead on the hillside. The path begins to incline upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep snowy hillside path with utility shed

events.description: character begins ascending steeper uphill grade along dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along a snowy dirt path, passing a utility shed and large rocks

entered.detail: blue and green plastic trash bins beside the shed
large boulders and rock formations along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep snowy hillside path, passing closely by a small wooden utility shed with trash bins. Large rocks line the right side of the path while residential buildings shift to the left. The terrain becomes more rugged as the climb continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open resort plaza into a rugged, ascending hillside path. It begins in a wide snowy square surrounded by large wooden buildings and stone benches, moving past a ski lift station toward a central lodge under the midday sun. As the character progresses, the open space narrows into a tree-lined walkway where the lodge remains ahead and the ski lift shifts to the right. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses an asphalt road, leaving the plaza behind to enter a residential zone characterized by wooden apartment buildings and an inclining path. Finally, the terrain becomes more rugged as the camera ascends a steep snowy slope, passing a small utility shed and trash bins while large rocks line the way.
